name: @shupeixuan/micro-panel-hub
description: Embeddable React micro frontend workspace shell built with qiankun and flexlayout-react.

scripts.build:lib: pnpm exec tsup --config tsup.config.ts && cat main-app/src/index.css main-app/src/App.css > lib/styles.css && cp node_modules/flexlayout-react/style/light.css lib/flexlayout-light.css && pnpm --dir sub-app-demo build && mkdir -p lib/sub-app-demo && cp -R dist/sub-app-demo/. lib/sub-app-demo/
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir main-app lint && pnpm --dir sub-app-demo lint
